calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Lorraine V Alarcon.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:54 am and concluding at 10:58 am.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank is represented by Thomas Sebourn, Esq.
Defendant Lorraine V Alarcon not appearing.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

The matter is submitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, and against Defendant Lorraine V Alarcon, as follows:

Damages/Principal: $3741.09
Interest: $0
Costs: $0

Total Judgment: $3741.09
Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-18-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
